titleStmt.title: SII 36.187: original edition by P Shanmugam
No. 187. (A.R. No. 187 of 1910.) PĀRIYŪR (Pāriyūrgrāmam), GOBICHETTIPALAYAM TALUK, COIMBATORE DISTRICT. On the west wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Amaraphaṇīśvara temple.

summary.p: A royal order issued to the sthānathār of the temple of Amaraviṭaṅka Perumāḷ at Pāriyūr. Araiyarkuḷam, a dilapidated irrigation tank was granted by the king as dēvadāṉa iṟaiyili. The proceeds from the lands shall be used for providing sacred food and for performing other services in the temple during the sandhi instituted in the name of the king and also during the Mārgaḻi festival in the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tirumukappaṭi tribhuvaṉac cakkravatti ko
ṉeriṉmai koṇṭāṉ pāriyūr Amaraviṭaṅkap
perumāḷ koyiṟ tāṉattāṟku Innāyaṉār tevatā
ṉamāṉa Araiyarkuḷam Uṭai kuḷamāyp pāḻkiṭan
tapaṭiyāle Innāyaṉārkku nam perāṟ kaṭṭi
ṉa cantikkum mārkaḻit tirunāḷaikkum Amutu
paṭi Uḷḷiṭṭa veñcaṉattukkut tevatāṉa I
ṟaiyiliyākat tantom Ikkuḷam Uṭaippum Aṭai
ttu payirum Ēṟṟi Aṉupavikkavum Ippaṭikku kallilum
cempilum veṭṭik koḷḷavum Ivai kāliṅka
rāyaṉ Eḻuttu yāṇṭu nālāvatu Ivai viḻuppātarāya
ṉ Eḻuttu Ivai kacciyarāyaṉ Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 36.187 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
